item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Nordic paprika casserole with mushrooms, sun dried tomatoes, white beans andsweet butternut squash, gently simmered for warmth and depth. Served withsteamed brown rice and crisp rye bread chips

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Whole roasted South Italian marinated cauliflower with golden edges andaromatic depth, served with warm farro salad and topped with a mix of freshleaves. Balsamic dressing and white bean hummus on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crushed and crispy fried potatoes topped with a soft centred egg, creamedspinach, fresh chives and shaved parmesan. A true Justi classic

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Cauliflower and chickpea curry simmered in creamy coconut milk, topped withfresh onion, apple and mango chutney, served with steamed rice and warmflatbread

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Italian pasta pomodoro with sun ripened tomato sauce and confit tomatoes,finished with manchego shavings, crispy garlic croutons and freshly choppedbasil
